name: KH-1 autophagy prediabetes registry
summary: Completed randomized quadruple-masked trial of KH-1 versus placebo in non-diabetic adults with elevated blood glucose, with insulin resistance as the primary endpoint and autophagy, inflammatory, cardiovascular, immune, safety, and quality-of-life secondary endpoints.
population: Actual enrollment of 42 non-diabetic adults with elevated blood glucose concentration

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry lists actual primary and study completion on June 8, 2023 and had no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Completed no-results trial-watch context, not evidence of benefit.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This is the most direct missing registry item because the title and secondary outcomes explicitly name stimulation of autophagy, but absent results prevent any efficacy or safety inference.
